The Free Firearm Sound Library
Authors: Ben Jaszczak, Brian Nelson, Kevin Heras, Matthew Nanney
Source: https://opengameart.org/content/the-free-firearm-sound-library
Archive: https://opengameart.org/sites/default/files/Prepared%20SFX%20Library.7z
Downloaded: 2026-07-23

License: CC0 1.0 Universal (Public Domain Dedication)
https://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/

From the library's description: "This library holds CC0 NO RIGHTS RESERVED
and may be used without royalty or credit for any application, personal or
professional." Kickstarter-funded field recording project (December 2013).

The full library is 56 recordings (24-bit/96 kHz stereo WAV) covering 22
firearms, each with near-distance and mid-distance takes. This vendored
subset keeps 10 files (five weapon classes x near + mid). Original archive
filenames are preserved as the suffix of each renamed file (e.g.
pistol-1911-shot-near_A42P.wav = "Prepared SFX Library/1911/A_42P.wav").
Prepared-Master-Sheet.csv is the library's own metadata sheet, retained in
full for provenance.

No attribution required. Credit retained as thanks.
